author: abcoathup
content:
There is a run-off between 🐻‍❄️ Polar Bear and 🦩 Flamingo,

Due to some potential funny business, several of the votes for Flamingo were removed from the tally, resulting in a TIE with Polar Bear.
If you have registered for an account with Ethereum Magicians before July 10th, you are eligible to vote in the tiebreaker contest.

Additionally, any votes found to share a registration IP address and creation date won’t be counted.

Vote now on Eth Magicians:
https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/mascot-needed-for-glamsterdam-upgrade/26008
